name: GPT (OpenAI)
narrative: GPT represents OpenAI, the most prominent frontier AI lab. OpenAI was founded with the mission of ensuring that artificial general intelligence benefits all of humanity. It has evolved into a capped-profit company with significant commercial interests, partnerships with Microsoft, and a leading position in AI deployment. GPT reflects OpenAI's position: commercially aggressive, seeking broad deployment, and navigating tension between safety commitments and competitive pressures.
